title: Settings

account.title: mnemo.studio Account

account.tokenError: Token saved but could not verify — {{error}}

vectorMemory.title: Semantic Memory
vectorMemory.description: When enabled, past messages are embedded as vectors and relevant context is automatically retrieved during generation.
vectorMemory.openaiKeyHint: Falls back to your active OpenAI connection profile key if empty.
